Add instructions, descriptions, or other: Add instructions, descriptions, or other text content to your report.
Analyze all features as a group: Analyze all features as a group
Are you sure you want to change the geog: Are you sure you want to change the geography from <2></2> to <6></6>? Changing the geography will require reprocessing existing sketches and recalculating any cached reports.
Are you sure you want to delete the tab: Are you sure you want to delete the tab '{{tabTitle}}'?
Are you sure you want to delete this car: Are you sure you want to delete this card?
Are you sure you want to delete this ite: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
Buffer the sketch before measuring overl: Buffer the sketch before measuring overlap. Distance is applied in meters.
Buffers should only be used to capture o: Buffers should only be used to capture overlap with features outside of the sketch geography. For example, intertidal areas on shore that would not overlap the sketch.
Choose a card type to add to the current: Choose a card type to add to the current tab.
Choose a geography to associate with thi: Choose a geography to associate with this sketch class. Polygons will be clipped to the geography bounds.

Choose a geography to associate with this sketch class. Sketches will be clipped to the inside of the geography bounds, while those drawn completely outside the bounds will be rejected. This can be used to remove land from ocean polygons, or aid users in digitizing a plan that follows an administrative boundary, such as the EEZ.
Choose from the templates below to creat: Choose from the templates below to create a new Sketch Class.
Choose which numeric column to calculate: Choose which numeric column to calculate statistics for
Customize this form to collect important: Customize this form to collect important information about sketches.
Data source was processed using <2>shape: Data source was processed using <2>shapely's make_valid function</2> to repair topology problems. You may wish to download and verify the output in desktop GIS.
Display statistical information about ra: Display statistical information about raster bands including min, max, mean, sum, and histograms.
Display whether features from a layer ar: Display whether features from a layer are present within the sketch.
Enable if you would like to disable and: Enable if you would like to disable and hide this sketch class. Existing sketches will not be deleted but new ones cannot be drawn.
Enter a name for the new tab: Enter a name for the new tab
Enter the service endpoint of a geoproce: Enter the service endpoint of a geoprocessing project with the geoprocessing client you would like to use.
Enter the service endpoint of a geoprocessing project with the preprocessing function you would like to use.
Existing data tied to this form input wi: Existing data tied to this form input will be lost, and cannot be restored.
Extra content beyond the first heading w: Extra content beyond the first heading will be ignored for Collapsible Groups
Failed to render report card body: Failed to render report card body
Geoprocessing services and clients defin: Geoprocessing services and clients define the reporting tools that will appear when inspecting this Sketch.
If you don't select a tab, the cards wil: If you don't select a tab, the cards will be deleted along with the tab.
Inputs are not rendered in when editing: Inputs are not rendered in when editing from the admin interface for performance reasons.
Logic rules control the visibility of th: Logic rules control the visibility of this form element based on the values of other form elements. For example, you could make a text input visible only if the user selects "Other" from a dropdown so they can specify more detail.
Name: Name
No cards found. Click the + button to cu: No cards found. Click the + button to customize.
No tabs yet. Add your first tab to get s: No tabs yet. Add your first tab to get started.
Once submitted, sketches will also be un: Once submitted, sketches will also be unioned with all Geography boundaries in this project so that metrics displayed in Reports can be summed and grouped by Geography.
One or more features have geometry topol: One or more features have geometry topology problems. These can slow calculations and result in less accurate results. Consider running validation checks in desktop GIS or reprocessing data using the repair option, which will use the <2>shapely make_valid</2> function to repair topology.
Or select a recently used project...
Otherwise there is a chance that sketche: Otherwise there is a chance that sketches split into multiple fragments across the antimeridian or geography bounds would result in double-counting where their buffered areas overlap each other.
Preprocessing services only support poly: Preprocessing services only support polygons at this time, with support planned for a future version of the tool. Contact <2>support@seasketch.org</2> if you need preprocessing for this geometry type.
Select a layer to analyze in this card.
Select a sketch to preview the report: Select a sketch to preview the report
Select a tab to move cards to...
Select a tab to move this card to.
Select one or more layers to analyze in: Select one or more layers to analyze in this card.
Select which statistics to display in th: Select which statistics to display in the table.
Setting an export id will give a stable: Setting an export id will give a stable column name when exporting data and is used in reporting.
Should match the signature of the <2>CRD: Should match the signature of the <2>CRDSS service</2>. Provide the root URL of the API server.
Show map layer visibility controls for l: Show map layer visibility controls for linked data layers in the card.
Sketch Classes define the feature types: Sketch Classes define the feature types your users will be able to draw and share. They define the geometry type, form attributes, and analytical reports associated with them. When used well they closely match regulatory or data collection goals.
Subject of LogicRule condition has no ty: Subject of LogicRule condition has no type!
Subject of LogicRule condition not found: Subject of LogicRule condition not found!
The appropriate filter input will be sho: The appropriate filter input will be shown to end-users when this property is selected.
The tab bar will only be shown if a repo: The tab bar will only be shown if a report has 2 or more tabs. Use the language selector if you would like to provide translated tab titles.
There are unpublished changes. Publish t: There are unpublished changes. Publish to save them.
These services accept user input and per: These services accept user input and perform transformation and validation functions, such as erasing land from a water polygon or ensuring a zone falls within a nation's exclusive economic zone (EEZ).
This Sketch Class can still be deleted s: This Sketch Class can still be deleted since it has fewer than 10 sketches. All related sketches will be deleted.
This filter service is on version {{vers: This filter service is on version {{version}} and currently contains {{featureCount}} features, with the following attributes available for filtering:
This report references data layers from: This report references data layers from the draft layer list that have not yet been published. Would you like to publish the overlays now?
This report references data layers which: This report references data layers which updates to their sources that have not yet been published. Would you like to publish the overlays now?
This tab contains {{cardCount}} cards. Y: This tab contains {{cardCount}} cards. You can optionally move them to another tab:
This will recompute all metrics for this: This will recompute all metrics for this card. Depending on data size, this may take some time. If you choose to recreate optimized layers, this will delete the cache of any related metrics.
To author reports based on real data, yo: To author reports based on real data, you need to create sketches in your account first. Consider creating multiple sketches that represent different scenarios to test your reports thoroughly.
Use the language selector to enter trans: Use the language selector to enter translated text in alternate languages.
When enabled, uses the new graphical rep: When enabled, uses the new graphical report builder instead of <2>geoprocessing services</2>.
You can only delete sketch classes if th: You can only delete sketch classes if they have not been used to create more than 10 sketches.
